content:
type: CLAIM
files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
summary: Adding optional path_transform parameter to all loader classes (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader)

fields.summary: Adding optional path_transform parameter to all loader classes (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader)

content:
type: ANSWER
files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
summary: path_transform added as last optional kwarg (default None) in every loader __init__ (FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader); since both our params are optional keyword args with defaults, order shouldn't break callers as long as they're keyword-only in practice - suggest putting fallback_searchpath before path_transform in FileSystemLoader.__init__ if we end up merging, since path_transform is the cross-loader one.

fields.summary: path_transform added as last optional kwarg (default None) in every loader __init__ (FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader); since both our params are optional keyword args with defaults, order shouldn't break callers as long as they're keyword-only in practice - suggest putting fallback_searchpath before path_transform in FileSystemLoader.__init__ if we end up merging, since path_transform is the cross-loader one.
